title: Mental Age
description: Find out your mental age based on your way of thinking.

questions.question: When facing a problem, you tend to...

options.text: Look for creative and spontaneous solutions
Analyze and make a mature plan
Stay calm, this has happened often

questions.question: How do you respond to sudden change?

options.text: Excited, something new!
A bit stressed but can adapt
Annoyed, I don't like change

questions.question: On weekends, you prefer to...

options.text: Try new activities and hang out outside
Balance between relaxing at home and being a bit productive
Rest quietly at home all day

questions.question: Your opinion on rules...

options.text: Often stifle creativity and freedom
Needed for order, but can be flexible
Must be followed strictly without compromise

questions.question: When someone offends you...

options.text: Immediately retaliate and show emotion
Talk to them nicely after I've calmed down
Stay quiet, no need to prolong the issue

questions.question: How do you manage your finances?

options.text: Often impulsive, buy whatever I like
Have a monthly budget, though sometimes a little off
Very planned, frugal, and focused on savings

questions.question: When meeting new people, you...

options.text: Enthusiastic, easy to get along with, and talk a lot
Friendly but keep your boundaries at first
Polite, formal, and tend to observe first

questions.question: Your view on the future...

options.text: Full of possibilities, surprises, and adventures
Optimistic with realistic and measurable plans
Hopefully safe, stable, and far from chaos

questions.question: When sad or heartbroken, you...

options.text: Cry hard, vent everywhere, then move on quickly
Reflect, process emotions, and find the mistake
Keep it to yourself, don't want to look weak in front of others

questions.question: What is your top priority right now?

options.text: Fun, new experiences, and freedom
Balance between career, family, and personal time
Financial security, peace, and life stability

questions.question: When planning a vacation, you choose...

options.text: Trendy, viral destinations full of fun activities
A mix of cultural exploration and relaxation
Quiet, comfortable places with guaranteed facilities

questions.question: What advice do you most often hear from others?

options.text: You're still childish / too careless
You're quite wise and reliable
You're too rigid / too serious

questions.question: A new gadget or technology is released. Your reaction...

options.text: Very enthusiastic (FOMO) and want to buy it immediately
Study the specs, buy only if needed
Skeptical, more comfortable using old stuff that still works

questions.question: Your daily fashion style...

options.text: Follows the latest trends, flashy, or expressive
Comfortable, neat, and appropriate for the situation
Classic, formal, or don't care about trends

questions.question: The type of humor that makes you laugh the most...

options.text: Absurd memes, viral videos, or silly jokes
Witty sarcasm, situational comedy (sitcoms), or dark jokes
Classic jokes, old jokes, or very rarely laugh out loud

questions.question: Your attitude toward the past...

options.text: Rarely think about it, more focused on today and tomorrow
Use it as a lesson not to repeat mistakes
Often feel nostalgic and think the old days were much better

questions.question: Your choice of entertainment viewing is usually...

options.text: Short fast videos (TikTok/Reels) or favorite vloggers
Movies or series (Netflix) with solid story plots
TV news, historical documentaries, or old shows

questions.question: When having a fight with a close friend...

options.text: Get angry, sulk, or immediately unfollow/block on social media
Take a pause, then have a mature discussion
Slowly distance yourself and let the friendship fade without drama

questions.question: Your current career or job goal is...

options.text: Pursue passion, seek fun, and freedom
Balance good salary with a rational career path
Prepare for a quiet retirement and stability without stress

questions.question: If forced to stay up until morning, usually because...

options.text: Playing games, watching series, or hanging out with friends
Finishing work close to deadline or overthinking
I can't stay up, by 10 PM I'm already very sleepy

questions.question: When very bored at home...

options.text: Look for escape by constantly playing on your phone or immediately go out
Do a relaxing hobby, read, or tidy the house
Boredom is normal, I enjoy the peace while sitting quietly

questions.question: Seeing a toddler having a tantrum (crying and rolling) at the mall...

options.text: Feel very annoyed, disturbed, and immediately walk away
Understand the situation and sympathize with the parents
Feel sorry, but secretly think parenting styles are different nowadays

questions.question: The music playlist you play most often contains...

options.text: Latest Top Hits, EDM, or viral internet songs
Pop/Indie songs, according to mood, or songs from high school/college
Old nostalgic songs, instrumentals, or relaxation music

questions.question: Your phone storage is full. You will...

options.text: Delete random apps/photos as long as you can use the phone now
Move data to the cloud or external hard drive neatly
Confused how to delete, leave it until the phone crashes

questions.question: Your attitude about keeping appointments...

options.text: Often late or cancel suddenly because of mood
Try to be on time, if late definitely notify far in advance
Absolutely disciplined, often arrive 15-30 minutes early

questions.question: Invited to a wedding or large social event...

options.text: Very excited to dress up maximally and make content
Come as you are, chat with acquaintances, then leave after eating
Feel tired just imagining the crowd, find an excuse to be absent

questions.question: Regarding daily food preferences...

options.text: Junk food, extreme spicy, or viral sweet foods
Balanced nutritious food although sometimes cheat day with good food
Home-cooked food, boiled, healthy, and avoid forbidden items

questions.question: Someone writes a negative/harsh comment on your social media...

options.text: Get angry and emotional, reply aggressively
Evaluate briefly, if unreasonable (toxic) just ignore/delete
I rarely active on social media so I don't care much about virtual things

questions.question: Heavy rain falls on the weekend...

options.text: Very annoyed because plans to go outside are totally ruined
Consider it the perfect time for me-time and tidying the house
Enjoy the peace of the rain while sipping warm coffee/tea

questions.question: The definition of 'True Love' in your mind is...

options.text: Very romantic, heart-pounding, and dramatic like in movies
Teamwork, strong commitment, and complementing each other's weaknesses
Habit, comfort, and accompanying each other until old age

questions.question: When faced with a very boring task...

options.text: Procrastinate until the last second because you're not in the mood
Do it little by little in between other activities
Do it immediately until finished so the burden of thought goes away quickly

questions.question: How do you consume news or political issues?

options.text: Follow opinion trends on Twitter/TikTok and react reactively
Read from multiple sources to find an objective point of view
Stay true to the conservative views I've held since long ago

questions.question: How you feel on your birthday...

options.text: Very excited, waiting for gifts, surprises, and messages from many people
Grateful, celebrate privately with closest people
Indifferent, just another day reminding you that age is decreasing

questions.question: If you suddenly get an unexpected 10 million rupiah...

options.text: Immediately checkout dream items or spend it on a lavish vacation
Save/invest some, enjoy a little as a reward
Save it all safely for emergency/health fund

questions.question: Getting on the wrong train/bus while traveling alone...

options.text: Panic, confused wanting to cry, and immediately call a friend
Open maps, find the fastest alternative route to turn back
Stay calm, get off at the next stop and ask locals/officers

questions.question: Your opinion on current slang used by young people...

options.text: I use them every day to stay relatable and cool
I understand the meaning, but rarely use them in my real conversations
I don't get it, the language is weird and ruins good language structure

questions.question: Your attitude towards physical condition and health...

options.text: Feel strong, eat whatever, and rarely care about sleep schedules
Starting to realize the importance of regular exercise and limiting sugar intake
Very careful, often take vitamins, and have regular medical check-ups

questions.question: The gift choice that makes you happiest right now...

options.text: Hype items, concert tickets, or trendy clothes
Electronics or functional furniture that I currently need
Grocery vouchers, joint supplements, or just peace and quiet

questions.question: When a long argument occurs...

options.text: Be stubborn and insist others admit I'm right
Look for a middle ground or agree to disagree
Give in, stay quiet, and leave because arguing wastes energy

questions.question: The essential items you must carry in your bag when traveling...

options.text: Large power bank, earphones, and skincare/makeup
Wallet, house keys, charger, and enough personal medication
Liniment oil, wet wipes, umbrella, and massage oil

questions.question: When you know you made a big mistake...

options.text: Apologize but look for justifications (make excuses)
Admit the mistake honestly and offer a solution to fix it
Be haunted by guilt and deep regret for a long time

questions.question: Your view on friendship circles...

options.text: The more friends/circles, the more fun and popular
Few friends but high quality and mutually supportive
My old friends from many years ago are the only ones I trust

questions.question: Your phone home screen...

options.text: Messy, many red notification badges, and cute widgets
Neat, apps grouped into folders by function
Very standard factory setting, font enlarged for easy reading

questions.question: When WiFi disconnects or slows down drastically...

options.text: Complain, get emotional, and keep restarting the modem
Find offline activities while waiting for connection to recover
Stay calm, life without internet for a few hours isn't a big deal

questions.question: The definition of 'Success' by your current life standards...

options.text: Being popular, rich, and able to travel the world freely
Financial stability, career growth, and a supportive family
Living a quiet life in the village, healthy, and without a penny of debt

questions.question: Dealing with elderly parents who are slow at using ATMs or phones in front of you...

options.text: Feel annoyed, tsk, and impatient waiting for them
Offer help politely to speed up the process
Wait patiently without complaining, realizing that age does slow people down

questions.question: Your habit of waking up on weekends/holidays...

options.text: Wake up very late (past 10 AM) because you stay up late revenge
Wake up at the usual weekday time, but laze in bed a while
Still wake up at 5 AM automatically even without an alarm

questions.question: If invited by friends to hang out until midnight...

options.text: Let's go! Won't go home until morning
Okay, as long as tomorrow is a holiday and I'm not tired
Politely decline, by 9 PM my body is already begging for bed

questions.question: Your reaction seeing a couple of teenagers being overly affectionate in public...

options.text: Secretly record them or gossip with the friend next to you
Feel awkward, look away, and ignore it
Shake your head lamenting the morals of today's generation

questions.question: Honestly from the bottom of your heart, you feel your mental age is...

options.text: Still like a teenager who refuses to grow up
Quite aligned with my biological age on my ID card
Very old, tired of the world, and have a truly elderly soul
